old_string:
module Uart_tx (
    input  logic        PCLK,           // System clock
    input  logic        PRESETn,        // Async reset, active-low
    input  logic [7:0]  PWDATA,         // Parallel input data
    input  logic        tx_fifo_push,   // FIFO write enable
    input  logic [7:0]  LCR,            // Line Control Register
    input  logic        enable,         // Transmit enable
    output logic        tx_fifo_empty,  // FIFO empty flag
    output logic        tx_fifo_full,   // FIFO full flag
    output logic [4:0]  tx_fifo_count,  // FIFO data count (0-16)
    output logic        busy,           // Transmit busy flag
    output logic        TXD             // Serial data output (registered)
);
new_string:
module Uart_tx (
    input              PCLK,           // System clock
    input              PRESETn,        // Async reset, active-low
    input      [7:0]   PWDATA,         // Parallel input data
    input              tx_fifo_push,   // FIFO write enable
    input      [7:0]   LCR,            // Line Control Register
    input              enable,         // Transmit enable
    output             tx_fifo_empty,  // FIFO empty flag
    output             tx_fifo_full,   // FIFO full flag
    output     [4:0]   tx_fifo_count,  // FIFO data count (0-16)
    output             busy,           // Transmit busy flag
    output             TXD             // Serial data output (registered)
);
